stories.title: Madonna, Shakira, and BTS to Headline World Cup Final Halftime Show
stories.desc: FIFA announces its first-ever World Cup final halftime show featuring Madonna, Shakira, and BTS on July 19, 2026 at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey.

stories.title: Shakira and Burna Boy Release Official 2026 World Cup Song 'Dai Dai'
stories.desc: FIFA unveils 'Dai Dai' as the official World Cup 2026 song, marking Shakira's fourth World Cup song contribution, with Burna Boy joining forces.

stories.title: World Cup Rosters: Bosnia First to Announce Squad, Messi Named for Argentina
stories.desc: Bosnia and Herzegovina became the first team to announce their full squad on May 11, while Lionel Messi was named in Argentina's roster for title defense.

stories.title: World Cup Base Camps Revealed for All 48 Nations
stories.desc: FIFA announces training and accommodation locations for all participating teams as tournament approaches with 30 days remaining until kickoff on June 11.

stories.title: Panini 2026 Sticker Album Features Record-Breaking 980 Stickers
stories.desc: Panini's largest World Cup sticker album ever launched with 980 stickers for all 48 teams, plus exclusive Coca-Cola partnership with 12 special stickers.

stories.title: Completing Panini Album Could Cost Over $2,000 Without Trading
stories.desc: Analysis reveals collectors may need over 1,000 sticker packs costing $2,000+ to complete the album, though swapping duplicates can reduce costs significantly.
